__fixture__.name: downgrade_required
__fixture__.scenario: A desktop/CLI client is ahead of the declared adjacent window against the remote agent. The boundary cannot attach at full mutation parity; the supported path is to downgrade the client to the adjacent window. Outcome is 'downgrade_required' with 'downgrade_best_effort' support, and the repair hints include 'downgrade_component' and 'use_file_or_review_only_mode'. Exercises the 'unsupported / out_of_window_degraded' lane of skew_window:desktop_cli_and_remote_agent.declared_adjacent_window.

dropped_capabilities.reason_note: Client 2026.06-preview is two minors ahead of agent 2026.02; mutating attach is outside the declared adjacent window.
Agent 2026.02 implements structured_task_events_v1 only; the v2 family is not in its capability set.

negotiation.reason: Client is ahead of the declared adjacent window. Supported options: downgrade the client to an adjacent version, or continue in file-or-review-only mode while the agent upgrade is staged.

skew_window.window_summary: Client and agent stay within the declared adjacent support window and negotiate the capability intersection.

upgrade_order.violation_note: Client upgraded past the declared adjacent window before the remote agent was upgraded; the boundary narrows to file-or-review-only mode.

downgrade_behavior.state_preservation_note: Review-only and file-only attach remain available during downgrade; mutating attach may narrow.
downgrade_behavior.note: Downgrade to the declared previous adjacent window is a best-effort path, never a silent support claim beyond the declared window.

fail_closed_state.visible_reason: Your desktop or CLI client is ahead of the remote agent's declared adjacent window. Attach is available in file or review-only mode; mutating attach is refused until the boundary returns to the adjacent window.

unsupported_state_behavior.contract_rule: Refuse attach or degrade to file-or-review-only mode with a visible upgrade or downgrade hint. Never partially load the mutating session.

repair_hints.instruction: Downgrade the desktop or CLI client to a version inside the agent's declared adjacent window (agent@2026.02 through agent@2026.04).
Continue the session in file-or-review-only mode while the agent upgrade is staged.
Upgrade the remote agent to a version inside the client's declared adjacent window to restore mutating attach.

notes: Illustrative seed envelope only; this is not a live release packet.
